candidates.why: Top-line operating revenue line and strongest semantic match for sales/revenue.
Also a top-line revenue total; useful as alternate label over time.
Not revenue from operations; financial income, so poor fit.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Bottom-line earnings measure, not revenue.
Comprehensive income, not revenue.

variables.notes: Both are valid revenue labels. 'Total Revenue' is preferred because it appears to include 'Other operating revenues' and is the broader top-line; later code can use as priority list.

candidates.why: Direct cost line and exact conceptual match for COGS.
Inventory asset, not an income statement expense.

variables.notes: Selected the income statement expense line. Duplicate appearances of the same label exist, but final_choice must not repeat the same row label twice.

candidates.why: Classic overhead/personnel cost component and above operating profit.
Broad overhead bucket above operating profit; suitable SG&A component.
Could be overhead-related but appears less substantive and likely subcomponent/placeholder.
Dedicated R&D line exists; per rule, include in XSGA too when separate and not obviously embedded elsewhere.
Headcount metric, not expense.

variables.notes: No explicit single SG&A subtotal is present. Chose overhead components above operating profit and included separate 'Research & Development' so that XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD removes R&D if reported separately. Excluded depreciation/amortization, impairments, restructuring, fair value items, and totals/subtotals.

candidates.why: Exact dedicated R&D expense label, located above operating profit.

variables.notes: Dedicated R&D row exists above operating profit, so mapped directly. Also included in XSGA_COMPONENTS per rule to allow subtraction.

Finance-cost line but generic and less granular; weaker than explicit interest rows.
Interest-related, but appears unpopulated and potentially intra-group/non-consolidated.
Equity attribution, not finance cost.
Equity attribution, not finance cost.

candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of lease interest; avoid if primary row selected.
Liability balance, not expense.
Balance sheet accrual, not expense flow.
Liability/accrual balance, not income statement expense.

Liability balance, not expense.
Equity item, not finance cost.
Equity item, not finance cost.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Prefer granular recurring components over net totals. 'Interest Expenses' appears to overlap with the more detailed breakdown because its values are close to the sum of 'Interest Expenses - rest' and 'Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities'; therefore excluded to avoid double counting. Excluded 'Net interest expenses' and generic/non-recurring finance lines.

candidates.row_label: Remeasurement of previously held equity interest

Income attribution line, not balance sheet equity.
Not total book equity.
Asset, not equity.
Liability, not equity.
Equity component but incomplete relative to total book equity.
Equity subcomponent only.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to shareholders of the parent
candidates.why: Best owner/parent equity line; excludes non-controlling interests, satisfying BE rule.
Includes NCI, so less preferred if parent-only equity exists.
Shareholder count, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to shareholders of the parent

variables.notes: Selected parent-attributable equity to exclude non-controlling interests and avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Income attribution line, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income attribution line, not balance sheet minority equity.
